stdout:
Table	Create Table
probes	CREATE TABLE `probes` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `uid` varchar(36) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `site` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `zone` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `type` enum('LINUX_EDGE','K8S_CLUSTER','NETWORK_TAP') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `capabilities` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `status` enum('ONLINE','OFFLINE','DEGRADED') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'OFFLINE',
  `auth_token_hash` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `last_seen_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `metadata` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `version` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `uptime_seconds` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  `cpu_percent` float DEFAULT NULL,
  `disk_free_mb` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  `interfaces` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `active_sessions` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  `total_captures` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  `last_error` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `health_status` enum('healthy','degraded','unhealthy') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `heartbeat_interval_sec` int(11) DEFAULT '30',
  `allowlist_cidrs` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `tls_enabled` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */,
  UNIQUE KEY `probes_uid_unique` (`uid`),
  KEY `idx_probes_status` (`status`),
  KEY `idx_probes_site` (`site`),
  KEY `idx_probes_created` (`created_at`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci AUTO_INCREMENT=90001
